title: actinocephalus brachypus
intro: Actinocephalus brachypus, also known as smallhead, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Actinocephalus brachypus are said to include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
